impact: This gives the PP&D daemon deterministic failure-context diagnostics and a reusable prompt fragment that narrows syntax-recovery proposals to one file or one test plus fixture while forbidding broad shared-contract rewrites.
summary: Add narrow syntax rollback prompt guidance helper for PP&D daemon use.
target_task: Task checkbox-55: Task checkbox-50: Add daemon prompt guidance and failure-context diagnostics for syntax-preflight rollbacks. When recent failures include `SyntaxError`, `py_compile`, `TS1005`, `TS1109`, or `TS1128`, the prompt must ask for a one-file or one-test-plus-fixture proposal and forbid broad shared-contract rewrites.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
